_publications._publicationTitle: Dopamine deficiency underlies learning deficits in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: CKO slices display diminished LTP (closed circles, EPSP slope; 128.8+ 7.6%, n=8) in response to high frequency stimulation (HFS) (open circles, EPSP slope; 165.2 + 6.8%, n=8)
details: Diminished LTP with EPSP slope of 128.8±7.6% (n=8) compared to 165.2±6.8% (n=8) in controls
